pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may work but prevents access to Spring Boot 3 features and is incompatible with the target stack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x enforces Java 17 as the minimum version; setting java.version to 11 would cause compilation failures or runtime incompatibilities with Spring Boot 3 APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Flyway PostgreSQL database driver dependency required by Flyway 9+ (bundled with Spring Boot 3).
pom.xml.why_exists: Flyway 9+ (used in Spring Boot 3) removed the default database driver from flyway-core; without this explicit dependency, Flyway will fail at runtime with a missing driver error for PostgreSQL.
